name: Shrimp-Pesto Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 Italian plum tomatoes, cut into wedges
1 package (6 ounces) Frozen tiny shrimp, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook macaroni as directed on the package. Rinse in cold water and drain.
2. Toss with oil.
3. Mix pesto, olives, vinegar, and tomatoes in a large bowl.
4. Arrange 2 cups of macaroni and 2 cups of spinach on top of the olive mixture.
5. Repeat with remaining macaroni and spinach.
6. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours.
7. Add shrimp to the salad and toss.
8. Sprinkle with grated parmesan cheese.
Serving size: 6 SERVINGS (ABOUT 1-1/4 CUPS EACH)
Calories per serving: 515
